texto: Management, a science? Of course not, it's just a waste-paper basket full of recipes which provided the dish of the day during a few years of plenty and economic growth. Now the recipes are inappropriate and the companies which persist in following them will disappear.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Leon Courville que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “Management, a science? Of course not, it's just a waste-paper basket full of recipes which provid…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, cybernetics, management, com foco em management e society.
